misc: Bags Miura irons and is rumoured to sleep with them.
biography: Miso, from Hirsala Golf, has forged a significant legacy within the demanding landscape of the Hector Trophée. His consistent presence across ten editions of this distinctive pairs competition speaks volumes of his profound dedication to the event's unique challenges.

Throughout his decade of involvement, Miso has demonstrated a profound understanding of the team dynamic, culminating in a notable triumph: his partnership successfully secured the esteemed Hector Trophée on one occasion. While the individual Victor Trophy has, as yet, remained beyond his grasp, his singular team victory underscores his capacity for collaborative excellence under pressure.

Beyond his competitive achievements, Miso is widely recognized for his exceptional dedication to his equipment. He exclusively entrusts his game to Miura irons, a preference so deep-seated that a playful rumor persists within the golfing community that he extends his meticulous care to the point of sleeping with them. This anecdote highlights a rare blend of technical precision and passionate attachment to the tools of his trade, which undoubtedly contributes to his focused approach on the course.

While the Hector Trophée 2026 will proceed without Miso gracing its fairways this year, marking a temporary pause in his pursuit of further accolades, his status as still active in Hector events signals an anticipated return. The golfing community will undoubtedly await the moment Miso once again joins the fray, eager to witness the continued journey of this dedicated artisan of the links.
